parsed.production_notes: The video features an AI-generated avatar. The facial expressions and lip movements are uncanny and don't perfectly align with the speech. The background is a static image, and the character's body movements are repetitive and slightly robotic, typical of AI video generation tools.

characters.appearance: Middle-aged Indian woman, medium build, brown complexion. She has dark hair tied back and a red bindi on her forehead. Her facial features are somewhat smoothed, typical of AI generation.
characters.wardrobe: She wears a dark blue short-sleeved uniform shirt with a logo over a teal patterned saree. She has a lanyard with an ID badge around her neck.

scenes.setting: A brightly lit stage with a large screen in the background and floral arrangements at the front.

panels.panel_visual_description: A middle-aged Indian woman stands on a stage, holding a microphone in her right hand and gesturing with her left. She is wearing a dark blue short-sleeved uniform shirt over a teal patterned saree, with a lanyard and ID badge around her neck. She has a red bindi on her forehead. The background features a large screen with a blurred image of a woman and some text, and floral arrangements are visible at the bottom edge of the stage. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a stage presentation.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows a woman delivering a speech on a stage. She is dressed in a uniform over a saree and holds a microphone. The background is a large screen with a blurred presentation, and there are flowers at the front of the stage. Text overlays appear at the bottom, translating her speech.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: আমি আবর্জনা তুলে কাজ করি। [I work by picking up garbage.]
Character A says: লোকজন আমাকে দেখতো না, কথা বলতো না। [People wouldn't look at me, wouldn't talk to me.]
Character A says: আর যখন বলতাম তখন বলতো সরে যা গাঁওয়ার। [And when I spoke, they would say move away, you rustic.]
Character A says: ওইদিন ডিসাইড করেছিলাম এই দুনিয়া আর আমাকে ignore করতে পারবে না। [That day I decided this world won't be able to ignore me anymore.]
Character A says: আমার নাম কমলা। [My name is Kamala.]
Character A says: হাওড়ায় আবর্জনা তুলে কাজ করি, আজও করি। [I work picking up garbage in Howrah, I still do.]
Character A says: আজ আমি এখানে দাঁড়িয়ে আছি। [Today I am standing here.]
Character A says: কিন্তু তিরিশ দিন আগে একটা মলের গার্ড আমাকে ধাক্কা মেরে বের করে দিয়েছিল। [But thirty days ago, a mall guard pushed me out.]
Character A says: খুব গরম ছিল সেদিন। [It was very hot that day.]
Character A says: যখন ভিতরে গেলাম, গার্ড আমার শাড়ি দেখে, আমার হাত দেখে বুঝে গেল আমি রাস্তায় কাজ করি। [When I went inside, the guard saw my saree, saw my hands and understood I work on the streets.]
Character A says: জোরে ধাক্কা দিয়ে বলল, সরে যা এখান থেকে গাঁওয়ার কোথাকার। [He pushed me hard and said, move away from here, you rustic.]
Character A says: আমি শুধু একটু জল চাইছিলাম। [I just wanted some water.]
Character A says: কিন্তু তার চোখে আমি মানুষ ছিলাম না। [But in his eyes, I wasn't human.]
Character A says: আমি ছিলাম গাঁওয়ার অশিক্ষিত, ভিতরে ঢোকার যোগ্য না। [I was a rustic, uneducated, not worthy of entering.]
Character A says: সেইদিন খুব কেঁদেছিলাম। [I cried a lot that day.]
Character A says: বাড়ি ফিরে চুপ করে বসেছিলাম। [I went back home and sat quietly.]
Character A says: মেয়ে চোখ দেখেই বুঝে গেল। [My daughter understood just by looking at my eyes.]
Character A says: বলল, মাম্মা কি হয়েছে? [She said, Mom, what happened?]
Character A says: আমি সব বললাম। [I told her everything.]
Character A says: মেয়ে চুপ ছিল। [My daughter was quiet.]
Character A says: তারপর একটা লাইন বলল, [Then she said one line,]
scenes.on_screen_text: আমি আবর্জনা তুলে কাজ করি (I work by picking up garbage) [Subtitles continue matching speech verbatim]

scenes.setting: A brightly lit stage with a large screen in the background and floral arrangements at the front.

panels.panel_visual_description: A middle-aged Indian woman stands on a stage, holding a microphone in her right hand and gesturing with her left. She is wearing a dark blue short-sleeved uniform shirt over a teal patterned saree, with a lanyard and ID badge around her neck. She has a red bindi on her forehead. The background features a large screen with a blurred image of a woman and some text, and floral arrangements are visible at the bottom edge of the stage. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a stage presentation.

scenes.visual_description: The woman continues her speech on stage, maintaining her position and attire. She gestures as she speaks about her daughter's advice and her journey of learning English. Text overlays provide subtitles for her speech.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: মাম্মা তুমি ইংলিশ শিখো। [Mom, you learn English.]
Character A says: লোকজন respect করবে। [People will respect you.]
Character A says: আমি হেসেছিলাম। [I laughed.]
Character A says: ভেবেছিলাম আমি আর ইংলিশ! [I thought, me and English!]
Character A says: আমি ইংলিশ বলবো? [Will I speak English?]
Character A says: কিন্তু ওই রাতেই একটা কথা মাথায় ঘুরতে থাকলো। [But that night, one thought kept spinning in my head.]
Character A says: যদি আমি ইংলিশ বলতে পারি, হয়তো লোকজন আমাকেও মানুষ হিসেবে দেখবে। [If I can speak English, maybe people will see me as a human too.]
Character A says: ওই রাতেই মেয়ে আমার ফোনে ইংলিশ শিখো অ্যাপ ডাউনলোড করে দিল। [That very night, my daughter downloaded the English Seekho app on my phone.]
Character A says: বলল, মাম্মা দেখো, এখানে হিন্দিতে ইংলিশ শেখায়। [She said, Mom look, here they teach English in Hindi.]
Character A says: রোজ শুধু দশ মিনিট আমি স্পোকেন ইংলিশ শো দিয়ে স্টার্ট করলাম। [Every day for just ten minutes, I started with the spoken English show.]
Character A says: বেসিক থেকে হ্যালো, থ্যাঙ্ক ইউ, এক্সকিউজ মি, প্লিজ, সরি। [From basics like hello, thank you, excuse me, please, sorry.]
Character A says: প্রথম দিন তো কথাই বেরোচ্ছিল না। [The first day, words wouldn't even come out.]
Character A says: এক্সকিউজ মি বলতে পাঁচবার ট্রাই করতে হয়েছিল। [I had to try five times to say excuse me.]
Character A says: কিন্তু আমি থামিনি। [But I didn't stop.]
Character A says: রোজ সকাল পাঁচটায় উঠে কাজে যাওয়ার আগে কুড়ি মিনিট ফোনে ভিডিও দেখতাম, শুনতাম, বলতাম। [Every day I woke up at 5 AM and before going to work, I watched videos on my phone for twenty minutes, listened, and spoke.]
Character A says: বাসেও ইয়ারফোন লাগিয়ে প্র্যাকটিস করতাম। [I also practiced on the bus wearing earphones.]
Character A says: আর অ্যাপে একটা জিনিস আছে এআই কোচ। [And there's one thing in the app, AI coach.]
Character A says: এটা আমার আসল সাপোর্ট হয়ে গেছিল। [This became my real support.]
Character A says: আমি হিন্দিতে বলতাম, ও ইংলিশে কনভার্ট করে দিত। [I would speak in Hindi, it would convert it to English.]
Character A says: আমি বলতাম আমার জল চাই। [I would say I want water.]
Character A says: ও শেখাতো I need water। [It taught me I need water.]
Character A says: ভিডিওতে যা শিখতাম, কোচের সাথে বলে প্র্যাকটিস করতাম। [Whatever I learned in the video, I practiced speaking with the coach.]
Character A says: রাতে বাচ্চারা ঘুমিয়ে পড়লে আমি এআই কোচের সাথে কথা বলতাম। [At night when the kids fell asleep, I would talk to the AI coach.]
Character A says: যেন একটা ইংলিশ বলা বন্ধু। [Like an English-speaking friend.]
Character A says: টিচার হলে অনেক টাকা লাগতো। [A teacher would cost a lot of money.]
Character A says: আর এআই কোচ আমার ফোনে রাত দুটোর সময়ও অ্যাভেইলেবল। [And the AI coach is available on my phone even at 2 AM.]
scenes.on_screen_text: মাম্মা তুমি ইংলিশ শিখো (Mom, you learn English) [Subtitles continue matching speech verbatim]

scenes.setting: A brightly lit stage with a large screen in the background and floral arrangements at the front.

panels.panel_visual_description: A middle-aged Indian woman stands on a stage, holding a microphone in her right hand and gesturing with her left. She is wearing a dark blue short-sleeved uniform shirt over a teal patterned saree, with a lanyard and ID badge around her neck. She has a red bindi on her forehead. The background features a large screen with a blurred image of a woman and some text, and floral arrangements are visible at the bottom edge of the stage. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a stage presentation.

scenes.visual_description: The woman continues her speech on stage, maintaining her position and attire. She gestures as she speaks about her daughter's advice and her journey of learning English. Text overlays provide subtitles for her speech.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: কিছুদিন পর আমি ডিসাইড করলাম আবার ওই মলে যাবো। [After a few days, I decided I will go to that mall again.]
Character A says: বুক জোরে ধুকপুক করছিল, হাত কাঁপছিল। [My heart was beating fast, my hands were shaking.]
Character A says: তবুও আমি গিয়ে গার্ডের সামনে দাঁড়িয়ে বললাম, [Still, I went and stood in front of the guard and said,]
Character A says: Excuse me sir. Could I please have a glass of water? I have been working outside and I am feeling quite dehydrated. [Excuse me sir. Could I please have a glass of water? I have been working outside and I am feeling quite dehydrated.]
Character A says: গার্ডের মুখ খোলা রয়ে গেল। [The guard's mouth was left open.]
Character A says: ওই গার্ড, ওই মল, ওই আমি। [That guard, that mall, that me.]
Character A says: কিন্তু এবার আমার ভাষা বদলে গেছিল। [But this time my language had changed.]
Character A says: গার্ড কিছুই বলতে পারলো না। [The guard couldn't say anything.]
Character A says: ম্যানেজার নিজেই জল নিয়ে এলো। [The manager himself brought water.]
Character A says: বলল, Please have a seat madam। [He said, Please have a seat madam.]
Character A says: আমাকে ম্যাডাম বলেছিল। [He called me madam.]
Character A says: বাইরে বেরোনোর সময় ওই গার্ড স্যালুটও করেছিল। [While going out, that guard even saluted me.]
Character A says: আজও আমি ওই কাজ করি। [Even today I do that work.]
Character A says: ওই কাপড়, ওই হাত, ওই শাড়ি। [Those clothes, those hands, that saree.]
Character A says: কিন্তু এখন লোকজনের ব্যবহার বদলে গেছে। [But now people's behavior has changed.]
Character A says: কারণ এখন আমি আমার কথা ওদের ভাষায় বলতে পারি। [Because now I can speak my words in their language.]
Character A says: ইংলিশ আমাকে টাকা দেয়নি, ইংলিশ আমাকে রেসপেক্ট দিয়েছে। [English didn't give me money, English gave me respect.]
scenes.on_screen_text: কিছুদিন পর আমি ডিসাইড করলাম আবার ওই মলে যাবো (After a few days, I decided I will go to that mall again) [Subtitles continue matching speech verbatim]

scenes.setting: A brightly lit stage with a large screen in the background and floral arrangements at the front.

panels.panel_visual_description: A middle-aged Indian woman stands on a stage, holding a microphone in her right hand and gesturing with her left. She is wearing a dark blue short-sleeved uniform shirt over a teal patterned saree, with a lanyard and ID badge around her neck. She has a red bindi on her forehead. The background features a large screen with a blurred image of a woman and some text, and floral arrangements are visible at the bottom edge of the stage. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a stage presentation.

scenes.visual_description: The woman continues her speech on stage, maintaining her position and attire. She gestures as she speaks about her daughter's advice and her journey of learning English. Text overlays provide subtitles for her speech.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: আর এখানে বসে থাকা সবার কাছে একটা কথা বলতে চাই, [And I want to say one thing to everyone sitting here,]
Character A says: যদি আমি পারি তাহলে আপনি কেন পারবেন না? [If I can, then why can't you?]
Character A says: তবুও আমি পেরেছি। [Still, I have succeeded.]
Character A says: রোজ শুধু দশ মিনিট ভিডিও থেকে শিখো, এআই কোচের সাথে প্র্যাকটিস করো। [Every day learn from videos for just ten minutes, practice with the AI coach.]
Character A says: আপনার আলাদা টিচার লাগবে না। [You won't need a separate teacher.]
Character A says: আপনার ফোনেই সব আছে। [Everything is on your phone.]
Character A says: ইংলিশ শিখো অ্যাপ ডাউনলোড করো, স্পোকেন ইংলিশ শো দেখো, এআই কোচের সাথে কথা বলো। [Download the English Seekho app, watch the spoken English show, talk to the AI coach.]
Character A says: তিরিশ দিনের চ্যালেঞ্জ নাও। [Take the thirty-day challenge.]
Character A says: আমার মেয়ে বলেছিল, মাম্মা ইংলিশ শিখো লোকজন রেসপেক্ট করবে। [My daughter said, Mom learn English, people will respect you.]
Character A says: ও ঠিক বলেছিল। [She was right.]
Character A says: আজ লোকজন রেসপেক্ট করে। [Today people respect me.]
Character A says: আর হ্যাঁ, আজ আমি ওই মলে যাই। [And yes, today I go to that mall.]
Character A says: জলও খাই, এসিতেও বসি। [I drink water, I sit in the AC.]
Character A says: গার্ড এখন চাও জিজ্ঞেস করে। [The guard now asks for tea.]
Character A says: ইন্সটল বাটনে ক্লিক করো আর এখনই ইংলিশ শিখো অ্যাপ ডাউনলোড করো। [Click the install button and download the English Seekho app right now.]
scenes.on_screen_text: আর এখানে বসে থাকা সবার কাছে একটা কথা বলতে চাই (And I want to say one thing to everyone sitting here) [Subtitles continue matching speech verbatim]

panels.panel_visual_description: A digital graphic showing a smartphone displaying a purple screen with a glowing white logo. The background is a dark purple with sparkling light effects.

scenes.visual_description: A digital end card showing a smartphone with the English Seekho app logo on a purple background. A cursor clicks an 'Install Now' button.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: দেরি না করে ইন্সটল নাউ-এ ক্লিক করো আর ইংলিশ শিখো অ্যাপ ডাউনলোড করে নাও। [Without delay, click on install now and download the English Seekho app.]

scenes.visual_description: A solid black screen with white disclaimer text.
scenes.on_screen_text: English Seekho kisi bhi government authority institution brand, organisation ya individual ke dwara endorsed, sponsored, affiliated ya associated nahi hai. Kisi bhi names trademarks logos ya references ka use sirf educational aur informational purposes ke liye kiya gaya hai Kuch content sirf samjhane ke liye dramatised ya representational ho sakta hai English Seekho kisi bhi guaranteed results ka promise nahi karta Outcomes individual effort aur doosre factors par depend karte hain aur vary kar sakte hain.
